name: Corn Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 7 by 7 inch baking dish with corn oil and preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a small bowl, beat the eggs and evaporated milk until blended. In another small bowl, stir together the sugar and cornstarch, then add them slowly to the egg mixture, beating constantly until blended. Fold in the creamed corn, salt, and pepper. Pour the mixture into the greased baking dish and dot with butter.
3. Bake until the pudding is set and golden brown on top, about 1 hour. Serve hot from the dish.
